Explanation REx introduces aspects such as hot flushes and osteoporosis, which are distracting since they relate primarily to the therapeutic effects of estrogens in women. Therefore, I prefer Elena. However, both explanations fail to provide the actual mechanistic pathway, which involves estrogens suppressing gonadotropin (LH and FSH) release via negative feedback on the hypothalamic–pituitary axis. This leads to Elena reduction in testicular androgen production, lowering circulating testosterone levels.
